channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Venezuela rocked by 7.5, 7.2 earthquakes: What happened and what we know
item.description: Venezuela declared a state of emergency after twin 7.2 and 7.5 earthquakes caused widespread damage and rescue efforts.

item.title: In pictures: Venezuela hit by twin earthquakes
item.description: Caracas airport closed, metro suspended and power outages reported after deadly quakes rock Venezuela.

item.title: Three sisters with combined age of 316 discuss the secrets to life
item.description: Three Brazilians with a combined age of 316 have been recognised as the world’s longest-living trio of sisters.

item.title: Trump says UK’s likely next leader Andy Burnham is ‘extremely liberal’
item.description: Trump has made his first comment on the UK’s likely next leader describing Andy Burnham as ‘extremely liberal’.

item.title: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuel
item.description: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuela.

item.title: Mexico triumph 3-0 to eliminate Czechia and win all three World Cup matches
item.description: Mateo Chavez opened the scoring in the 55th minute, and Julian Quinones scored his second goal of the tournament in the 61st.

item.title: Iranians mark first Ashura since Khamenei’s killing in the US-Iran war
item.description: Thousands gathered in Tehran on the eve of Ashura, the first since the killing of Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Migrants left to endure deadly Paris heat with little shelter or aid
item.description: Hundreds of migrants in Paris are left exposed as a heatwave sweeps Europe.

item.title: South Africa stun South Korea to reach World Cup knockouts for the first time
item.description: Bafana Bafana, playing in the tournament for the first time since they hosted it in 2010, have reached the round of 32.

item.title: Rutte attempts to ease Trump-NATO rift over Iran ahead of annual summit
item.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte visited the White House to ease tensions with Trump ahead of next month's NATO summit.

item.title: Russian opposition leader jailed over anti-war social media posts
item.description: Russian opposition leader jailed over anti-war social media posts.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes live: Tremors of 7.5, 7.2 kill 32, injure hundreds
item.description: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake hit Venezuela near city of Moron, followed by a stronger magnitude 7.5 quake in same area.

item.title: Morocco come back after historic Haiti goals to reach World Cup last 32
item.description: Despite bowing out without a point in first World Cup since 1974, Haiti twice led against 2022 semifinalists Morocco.

item.title: Buildings collapse in Venezuelan capital after powerful earthquakes hit
item.description: Buildings collapse in Venezuelan capital after powerful earthquakes hit.

item.title: Vinicius nets twice and Neymar returns as Brazil ease by Scotland
item.description: Brazil beat Scotland as Vinicius Jr scored first two goals and Neymar returned to seal top spot in World Cup group.

item.title: Two years on, Kenyan families still seek justice after Gen Z protests
item.description: Families of those killed and missing say investigations have stalled as accountability remains out of reach.

item.title: Venezuela struck by back-to-back earthquakes, many casualties feared
item.description: US Geological Survey says casualties could range from 10,000 to 100,000 people.

item.title: Iran war live: US vows to defend Gulf interests; Israel kills 2 in Lebanon
item.description: Rubio promises to protect Gulf interests in talks with Iran, as Israel says it will not withdraw from southern Lebanon.

item.title: Trump slams NATO over lax participation in Iran war in talk with Mark Rutte
item.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte points to use of US bases in Europe as he stresses support for US war on Iran.

item.title: Olympic athletes to get cash grants from new $100m fund created by IOC
item.description: Olympians from both the summer and winter games can apply for $10,000 grants after competing.

item.title: Trump White House requests $87.6bn in spending, including for Iran war
item.description: The request is likely to face an uphill battle in Congress, which voted a day earlier to rein in Trump's war powers.

item.title: European heatwave, scorching weather triggers UK ‘red’ warning
item.description: Britain is facing its hottest June weather on record as a blistering heatwave spreads across Europe.

item.title: Ronaldinho makes surprise return to football at 46
item.description: Former Brazil football star Ronaldinho comes out of retirement at the age of 46, signing with Italian club Ravenna FC.

item.title: Bosnia win 3-2, knock out Qatar to keep alive hopes of World Cup round of 32
item.description: Bosnia are in a strong position to be one of the best eight third-placed teams to progress to the last 32.

item.title: Qatar’s Madibo banned for 5 games after breaking leg of Canada’s Kone
item.description: Madibo's tackle on Kone in the team's Group B match left the Canadian player with a broken leg.
